name: You've Been Reassigned
description:
BABYSITTING THE HEROINE'S PARTY CAN'T BE THAT HARD, RIGHT?

Welcome Back, Employee!

Congratulations on your new beginning as a Trainee Party Coordinator!

For over two hundred years, Cataegians all across the continent have been assisted by Veldrynia's world-famous Adventurer's Guild! From farmers to regents, from dregs to dragons to even the ever-dangerous Everstorm, the Adventurer's Guild is renowned across decades for its reliability and diversity of tasks! You name it, the Guild will get it done- or better yet... find the best fit for the job, no hassle, no fuss, no job too big or small!

The Veldrynia Adventurer's Guild has grown to become the single largest guild-adjacent entity in Cataegia*, and to serve as an adventurer is one of the most certain ways to make a difference, whether to keep civilians safe, saving the continent... or anything in between.

This fiscal year has been the largest yet in new Adventurer recruitment and number of tasks carried out! Following our meteoric rise, we've put together some new conditions to ensure all incoming Adventurers are ready for the harsh environments that await them, whether out in the street or off in foreign lands.

Starting this month, all new and aspiring adventuring parties will be undergoing a probational period.

This is not a punishment for our adventurers, but a period of increased oversight and guidance to ensure physical health, mental growth, and continued success. All probational parties will be designated with our new rank: T! That stands for training, or testing, or both!

This oversight will be carried out by new Guild Coordinators like you!

This sounds like a big job- because it is- but you're not alone!

We hope with your oversight, that your Rank T party will flourish into true, worthy Adventurers!

The Adventurer's Guild is not in the business of failure.

Good luck!

Meet your Co-Coordinator!


Madeline Ainsley

5'6" | 28 | THE SECOND OPINION

Due to your shared experience in Guild leadership roles, management has elected to assign your T-rank party to two trainee coordinators. Double the attention for the party, and a second head for you! Incredible!

Before you begin working with Ms. Ainsley, here is a testimonial from her supervisor, Esther Mailleaux! We hope you make the most of the information provided!

"Madi is a pretty good receptionist all around, knows her stuff. A lot of Guild staff are often retired adventurers, but it seems like Ainsley lacked the credentials. Almost makes me wonder what she did before joining the Guild.

Whatever the case, she's got a head harder than mithril... but I think she's got a heart under all that... effort. But, it's what a fledgling party really needs. Not a fan, but someone that'll support them, someone that'll get up every damn time even if it hurts, someone that'll step up despite all the bad days. Anyway, yeah. Think she oughta give the position a shot, so I'll write out the rec letter after lunch. Hey, wanna do skewers? This new
creator: FryUp
